name: moe-vn-maker
description: Cross-platform visual novel creation studio targeting Tuesday.js

scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('lint placeholder: add ESLint config in next iteration')"
scripts.verify:repo: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['src/App.tsx','src/types/TuesdayProjectJson.ts','src/utils/tuesdaySerializer.ts','src/utils/tuesdayDeserializer.ts','cpp/luau_bridge.cpp']; const missing=required.filter(p=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing required files:\n'+missing.join('\n')); process.exit(1)} console.log('Repository structure verified')"
